summary: Critical: fixture files referenced in workflow defaults (fixtures/config-mixed.json) are missing, making workflow non-functional. Missing Set-StrictMode in script. JSON parsing (line 70) lacks error handling. Actions not SHA-pinned (line 33 uses @v4). Pester install duplicated (lines 40-43 vs 53-56). Script structure and readability strong, but deliverable incomplete per task requirements.
